channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 12 of the best sleep-hacking gadgets to help you get the best rest of your life — by a former Sleep Editor
item.description: It's Sleep Awareness Week, and that's a good a time as any to sort out your slumber.

item.title: Spider-Man Gets Two New Comics for ‘Brand New Day’ Synergy
item.description: Before you watch 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' on the big screen, a new pair of comics want to remind you of the film and its big players.

item.title: Will the Pentagon’s Anthropic controversy scare startups away from defense work?
item.description: On the latest episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, we discussed what the controversy means for other startups seeking to work with the federal government.

item.title: Is that a Mac mini in disguise? No, but the new Satechi CubeDock packs in everything you'd want in a mini PC — and for much less
item.description: The Satechi CubeDock supports multiple displays, fast NVMe drives, and various devices while streamlining workspace setup in a single aluminum enclosure.

item.title: MacBook Neo vs MacBook Air M5 — how do they compare and which should you buy?
item.description: Wondering how the new MacBook Air and MacBook Neo stack up? We've got the full lowdown for you.

item.title: Test Oniverse Aura : une manette ultra personnalisable à un prix abordable
item.description: La manette Aura Oniverse s'avance avec pour argument principal une polyvalence sur de nombreux périphériques et un rapport qualité/prix intéressant. Offre-t-elle des performances suffisantes pour être pleinement recommandable ?

item.title: L’excellent Fitbit Charge 6 passe sous les 100 euros chez Amazon avec une remise de presque 40 %
item.description: Amazon ne se contente pas de faire tomber le prix du Fitbit Charge 6 à 99 euros puisqu'avec cette offre, Fitbit Premium est offert pendant six mois.

item.title: Godzilla’s Early ‘Minus One’ Form Comes to Life in This Action Figure
item.description: Before 'Godzilla Minus Zero' this November, S.H. MonsterArts is giving Godzilla fans the 'Godzilla Minus One' figure of their dreams.
